feature: Module settings backup/restore with comparison & change-log tool
quote: This is some of the complete module settings back up, for restore, should you make changes. It also has a comparison tool, between different write to ECU sessions, to see changes in value and how those changes can be compared to address keeping the change, or making a value change to get to your intended desired results.
author: Itsdchz

quote: Mirror error on info screen, warnings on infotainment, are currently in progress !!!
author: Itsdchz

quote: some big talk to nail down the timeline up to launch of what will be included initially, update timeline after launch, for extended features, customization etc.
author: Itsdchz

feature: Generic OBDII reader mode with live data
quote: Users of the Agile Offroad Ineos Scanner Software will ALSO have the ability to use it as an everyday surface level OBDII reader, and perform the simplistic tasks that the other code readers on the market are limited to. Such As: Live OBDII data
author: Itsdchz

quote: If this was possible, I'd marry John Brindell: AC recirculate - default on
author: joejet

feature: Low-fuel warning calibration (trigger levels & alert responses)
quote: Low fuel warning calibration (change trigger levels and alert responses)
author: DefenderGuy

quote: The ability to offset the computed altitude and/or retune it; it's pretty consistently too low by about 100 feet
author: DefenderGuy

quote: Ability to turn off traction control at any speed
author: singlefin

quote: We have OFFICIALLY unlocked to our Beta testers, the super secret, highly contagious, EXPERT CODING of the BCM and HU.
author: Itsdchz

feature: Preset drop-down for one-click removal of ADAS, lane-keeping, low-pressure warnings, low-fuel bong
quote: Agile is also building a preset list/drop down, that will allow users to have Agile's software do all the work of expert coding, but with a click of a preset.
author: Itsdchz

feature: John Brindell voice pack — replace warning sounds with custom phrases
quote: John Brindell's voice has been loaded into the system, much like Siri. Multiple phrases can replace a lot of those annoyances.
author: Itsdchz

feature: Backup camera auto-activation in Off-road mode
quote: Always have the backup camera come on when in Offroad mode. It's silly it's buried under menus.
author: Mahoneyj

quote: Make the menu hand wheel change screen focus for each click of the wheel. This is the most maddening interface ever.
author: Mahoneyj

feature: ADAS complete disable via Expert Coding toggle — menu & telltale removal
quote: What if I Toggle it to the Drop down of OFF in the AVD menu you see above? The RESULT???? WHERE did the ADAS menu go????? GONE !POOF! Instant ADAS EVERYTHING- BYE FELICIA!!!
author: Itsdchz

feature: Expert Coding & ADAS toggle — deferred to post-launch update (soon after public release)
quote: The ADAS feature and Expert Coding WILL NOT be available on initial Public Release, as we still have a bit more testing to green light those features. But, Agile promises…. SOON after Public release, the updates will be flowing
author: Itsdchz

feature: Bi-directional actuation control — component testing (fuel pump, injectors, DPF regen, EGR, AdBlue, cooling fans, ABS bleed)
quote: ability of the tool to send commands to test/trigger various components. e.g. fuel pump, turn an injector off with engine running or to fire with engine off, test fuel pressure reg/control valve, force a dpf regen, open/close the egr valve, test ad blue pump, test cooling fans, bleed abs.
author: bakepl

quote: I should be able to provide an update today that the Release Candidate is finalizing testing. Process of the first wave, early adopter list and fulfillment. Public order banks opening.
author: Itsdchz

quote: Other devices, through mobile and WIFI/BLE are in the near future roadmap.
author: Itsdchz

feature: DPF soot-load monitoring & manual regen trigger
quote: An advanced feature for AVD would be able to view this value and request an early partial regeneration if the owner knows it will be inconvenient or unsafe to let the DDE do it on schedule.
author: Clark Kent
